title: Retail & Shops
metaTitle: Retail Billing & Inventory Software for Shops · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free billing plus barcode inventory, low-stock alerts and live valuation for shops and retailers. Sell fast, never run out, keep your books clean. Works worldwide.
keywords: retail software, shop billing software, barcode inventory, point of sale invoicing, low stock alerts, retail erp, multi-store inventory
heroTitle: Sell fast, never run out
heroSubtitle: Bill customers in seconds, scan barcodes to sell, and let stock update itself. Paper & Pen keeps your shelves, sales and books in step so you spend less time counting and more time selling.
heroBullets: Low-stock alerts before you run out

features.title: Quick billing
features.desc: Ring up a sale and print or share a receipt in seconds, on any device.

features.title: Barcode inventory
features.desc: Scan to sell or receive, organised by SKU, batch and unit of measure.

features.title: Low-stock alerts
features.desc: Set reorder points and get warned before a best seller hits zero.

features.title: Multi-store stock
features.desc: Track and transfer stock across branches with live quantities everywhere.

features.title: Live valuation
features.desc: Average or FIFO costing keeps stock value accurate on your balance sheet.

features.title: Best-seller reports
features.desc: See what moves and what sits, by item, category and store.

sections.title: Billing built for a busy counter
sections.body: Customers don't wait. Build a sale by scanning or searching, apply a discount, take payment and hand over a clean receipt in seconds. Receipts share on WhatsApp or print for the till, and every sale flows straight into your stock and books with nothing to re-key.
items: Scan or search to add items fast

sections.title: Know what's on the shelf, always
sections.body: Manual counts go stale the moment you make a sale. In Paper & Pen, every sale and delivery adjusts stock in real time, so the number on screen matches the shelf. Set reorder points so the system flags slow restocks before you lose a sale. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR and 5% VAT, and ready for USD, EUR or any tax rate you trade in.

faqs.q: Can I sell using a barcode scanner?
faqs.a: Yes. Scan to add items to a sale or to receive stock. Items are organised by SKU, batch and unit of measure for fast, accurate billing.

faqs.q: Will my stock update when I make a sale?
faqs.a: Yes. Every sale reduces stock and every delivery increases it in real time, across all your stores, with no manual counting.

faqs.q: Can I run more than one shop?
faqs.a: Yes. Track stock per store, transfer between branches and see live quantities everywhere from one workspace.
Sales and Invoicing, including receipts, is free forever. Add the Inventory module when you want barcode stock control and low-stock alerts.

faqs.q: Does it work outside the GCC?
faqs.a: Yes. Paper & Pen works in any currency with any tax rate, so retailers anywhere can bill and manage stock, with Arabic, English and more on tap.

ctaTitle: Run your shop without the guesswork
ctaSub: Start free with billing and receipts, then add Inventory for barcode stock and low-stock alerts.
